name: local-filesystem-tool
prompt: I want Claude to be able to read and analyze log files on my local machine. The logs are in /var/log/myapp/ and I want tools to search them, tail them, and parse error patterns. Just for me, no one else needs this.
expected_output: Should recommend local stdio or MCPB, one-per-action pattern, readOnlyHint annotations. Should NOT recommend remote HTTP.
assertions: Recommends local stdio or MCPB, NOT remote HTTP
Uses readOnlyHint: true annotation for read-only tools
Mentions MCPB upgrade path for future distribution
